name: Academy Enrollment System
description: Student enrollment and class management system for 9jacodekids Academy

JWT_SECRET.description: JWT signing secret. Use a unique value for each environment.

DB_INIT_MODE.description: Database initialization mode. Use migrate for staging and production.

RUN_DATABASE_SEED.description: Whether to seed database on startup. Keep false for staging and production unless explicitly needed.

ALLOW_START_WITH_DB_INIT_FAILURE.description: Whether the app should start if database initialization fails. Keep false for staging and production.
